_comment: Copy this file to .claude/devops.local.json (gitignored) and fill in your server details. The devops agent and coolify-ops skill read it for SSH + Coolify access. Never commit the .local.json.
_comment_ssh: If you have a ~/.ssh/config Host alias, just set { "alias": "my-alias" } and omit the rest — it takes precedence. Otherwise provide host/user/port/identityFile.
